1.desc: In the quiet luxury of the Sterling estate, the master of the house, Reginald Sterling, has been found dead in his private study at 2:00 PM. Now, the player must navigate the conflicting stories of the five people present to determine who committed the crime during a narrow window of missing time.

char.Eleanor Sterling: The victim's devoted and fragile wife, who claims she was seeking refuge from the household tension in the kitchen.
char.Arthur Sterling: The arrogant sole heir to the fortune, who insists he only arrived at the mansion moments before the body was found.
char.Maria Rossi: The meticulous and observant maid, who discovered the crime scene while delivering the afternoon tea service.
char.Tommy Miller: The stoic family driver, who spent the afternoon at the front of the house and greeted the son upon his arrival.
char.Gardner Gary: A reclusive new employee who avoids social interaction and was tending to the flowers near the study window.
